---
title: "Appendix"
body-classes: no-chapter-nav
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

This is an overview of additional material we provide:

-   In [Glossary](81-glossary.qmd), you can get a useful overview of important functions.

-   In the [GitHub forum](82-forum.qmd), you can discuss questions with others.

-   In [FAQ R](83-faq-r.qmd), we provide an overview of common R question.
